Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Class ThemeService

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora.Shell
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Runtime.dll

Bridge service implementation that exposes OS theme information to JavaScript. Uses IPlatformThemeProvider for OS-specific detection and BridgeEvent<T> for push-based theme change notifications.

public sealed class ThemeService : IThemeService, IDisposable
Inheritance
object
ThemeService
Implements
IThemeService
IDisposable

Constructors

ThemeService(IPlatformThemeProvider) 

public ThemeService(IPlatformThemeProvider provider)

Parameters

provider IPlatformThemeProvider

Properties

ThemeChanged

Push event fired when the OS theme changes (dark/light, accent color, high-contrast).

public IBridgeEvent<ThemeChangedEvent> ThemeChanged { get; }

Property Value

IBridgeEvent<ThemeChangedEvent>

Methods

Dispose()

Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

public void Dispose()

GetAccentColor()

Returns the OS accent color as a hex string ("#RRGGBB"), or null on unsupported platforms.

public Task<string?> GetAccentColor()

Returns

Task<string>

GetCurrentTheme()

Returns the current OS theme info (mode, accent color, high-contrast state).

public Task<ThemeInfo> GetCurrentTheme()

Returns

Task<ThemeInfo>

GetHighContrastMode()

Returns true if the OS is in high-contrast mode.

public Task<bool> GetHighContrastMode()

Returns

Task<bool>
